emails.subject: Re: #519874.01
emails.body: Re: #519874.01 The delivery point on this deal originally was confirmed as COB S/N. Due to complications in the P& L calculation, Sean changed the location to PGE system and forgot to disable the confirmation. We have been scheduling it and changing it daily back to COB S/N. Until we figure out a way to properly value this deal, it will remain as a PGE to PGE buy/resale. Please contact myself or Sean if you have any questions. Diana Scholtes Kate Symes 03/06/2001 11:36 AM
